from pyspark.sql import SparkSession
from pyspark.sql import functions as F
from pyspark.sql import types as T
from pyspark.sql import functions as F
from pyspark.sql.types import *
from delta.tables import DeltaTable

# Partitioning
# spark.conf.set("spark.sql.shuffle.partitions", "2000")   # tune later if partitions are too small/large

# Shuffle + heartbeat stability
#spark.conf.set("spark.network.timeout", "800s")
#spark.conf.set("spark.executor.heartbeatInterval", "60s")
spark.conf.set("spark.shuffle.io.maxRetries", "10")
spark.conf.set("spark.shuffle.io.retryWait", "10s")

# Skew handling
spark.conf.set("spark.sql.adaptive.enabled", "true")

# Broadcast joins
spark.conf.set("spark.sql.autoBroadcastJoinThreshold", -1)  # disable auto

# -------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 3️⃣ Helper function to explode country lists
# -------------------------------------------------------------------------
def explode_country(df, country_col, label_prefix):
    """
    Explode comma-separated country lists per author type,
    compute fractional article weights (1 / distinct countries per DOI),
    and align parallel columns.
    """
    exploded = (
        df
        .withColumn("country", F.explode(F.split(F.col(country_col), ",")))
        .where(F.col("country").isNotNull() & (F.col("country") != ""))
        .withColumn(
            f"articles_per_country_{label_prefix}",
            F.lit(1.0) / F.size(F.array_distinct(F.split(F.col(country_col), ",")))
        )
        .withColumn("articles_per_country_all",
                    F.when(F.lit(label_prefix == "all"), F.col(f"articles_per_country_{label_prefix}")).otherwise(F.lit(None)))
        .withColumn("articles_per_country_first",
                    F.when(F.lit(label_prefix == "first"), F.col(f"articles_per_country_{label_prefix}")).otherwise(F.lit(None)))
        .withColumn("articles_per_country_corresp",
                    F.when(F.lit(label_prefix == "corresp"), F.col(f"articles_per_country_{label_prefix}")).otherwise(F.lit(None)))
        .withColumn("articles_per_country_best_guess",
                    F.when(F.lit(label_prefix == "best_guess"), F.col(f"articles_per_country_{label_prefix}")).otherwise(F.lit(None)))
    )
    return exploded

# -------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 4️⃣ Create per-author-type exploded datasets
# -------------------------------------------------------------------------
all_authors = explode_country(df, "country_codes_all_authors", "all")
first_authors = explode_country(df, "country_codes_first_author", "first")
corresp_authors = explode_country(df, "country_codes_corresp_author", "corresp")

# Best guess = corresponding author if available, else first author
df_best = df.withColumn(
    "country_codes_best_guess",
    F.when(
        F.col("country_codes_corresp_author").isNotNull() & (F.col("country_codes_corresp_author") != ""),
        F.col("country_codes_corresp_author")
    ).otherwise(F.col("country_codes_first_author"))
)
best_guess = explode_country(df_best, "country_codes_best_guess", "best_guess")

# -------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 5️⃣ Align column order across all DataFrames before union
# -------------------------------------------------------------------------
common_columns = [
    "doi", "type", "type_crossref", "journal_issn_l", "license", "version",
    "host_type", "sources_id", "year", "oa_status", "country",
    "articles_per_country_all", "articles_per_country_first",
    "articles_per_country_corresp", "articles_per_country_best_guess"
]

all_authors = all_authors.select(*common_columns)
first_authors = first_authors.select(*common_columns)
corresp_authors = corresp_authors.select(*common_columns)
best_guess = best_guess.select(*common_columns)

country_records = (
    all_authors
    .unionByName(first_authors)
    .unionByName(corresp_authors)
    .unionByName(best_guess)
)

# -------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 6️⃣ Aggregate by journal + country + year + OA type
# -------------------------------------------------------------------------
country_ship = (
    country_records.groupBy(
        "sources_id", "year", "oa_status", "country",
        "type", "type_crossref", "journal_issn_l", "license", "version", "host_type"
    ).agg(
        F.countDistinct("doi").alias("articles"),
        F.sum("articles_per_country_all").alias("articles_per_country_all"),
        F.sum("articles_per_country_first").alias("articles_per_country_first"),
        F.sum("articles_per_country_corresp").alias("articles_per_country_corresp"),
        F.sum("articles_per_country_best_guess").alias("articles_per_country_best_guess")
    )
    .withColumnRenamed("country", "ISO2_Code")
    .orderBy("sources_id", "year", "oa_status", "ISO2_Code")
)
